chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-513 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.11.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last consecutive dates of hearing, which prima facie reflects that petitioner has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
